titleText: JTF News: PBS NewsHour, BBC News
mainText: A Russian missile struck an apartment building in Kharkiv, Ukraine, resulting in at least 10 deaths.
An explosion occurred at the U.S. embassy in Oslo, and Norway police are investigating whether it was terrorism.
Iranian state TV reports Mojtaba Khamenei named successor to the supreme leader.
A search for missing Flight MH370 concluded without locating the aircraft 12 years after its disappearance.
Israel conducted strikes on oil storage sites near Tehran, Iran.
